_comment: VERIFIED hex values extracted from Tyler Crowe's brand deck (JS_Presentation-3.pdf, page 27).
_status: VERIFIED — sampled from Tyler's PDF on page 27
_designerNotes: Names are Tyler's official brand color names. Use these exact names in code comments and design conversations.

minted.name: MINTED
minted.usage: Primary teal/mint. Heavy hitter, use frequently. The 'wow' color — eyebrows, accents, callouts.

flash.name: FLASH
flash.usage: Hot pink magenta. Second primary, heavy hitter. CTAs, drop announcements, hype moments.

cash.name: CASH
cash.usage: Bright green. Used SPARINGLY — primarily as halftone gradient + special accents.

sole.name: SOLE
sole.usage: Pure white. Foundation, contrast, clean negative space.

leather.name: LEATHER
leather.usage: Near-black. Primary background, depth, the canvas everything sits on.

fonts._note: Tyler's font picks from page 28. Google Fonts substitutes researched separately for web use.

google_fonts_substitutes.display_athletic: Anton OR Bebas Neue (substitutes for Monta Stella / Heavy Turbo)
google_fonts_substitutes.display_bold: Big Shoulders Display (substitute for Bold Turbo)
google_fonts_substitutes.script: Caveat Brush OR Permanent Marker (substitute for Carlson Script)
google_fonts_substitutes.body_sans: Inter OR DM Sans (substitute for Termina)

do_not_use: Pure white #ffffff in copy text (use SOLE but as accent surface, not body color)
